localAggregateMetrics.zeroPlannerTokenInterpretation: Failed or short-circuited rows; not evidence of zero-token planning.

cloudWatchCrossCheck.publicDisclosure: Do not expose log group names, environment labels, account details, S3 paths, or trace identifiers in public copy.

supported: Pack has a real 100-case benchmark corpus and local run artifact with token and cost accounting.
The current benchmark covers private context, calendar grounding, email grounding, group travel, public events, flights, hotels, red-herring avoidance, and preference handling.
The local aggregate planner field records 21,920,541 planner tokens, while broader AI-call logs for the same planning window record 25,204,798 total tokens.
notSupportedYet: A public claim that Pack uses X% fewer tokens than competitors.
A public claim that Pack uses X% less energy than competitors.
Any claim that failed or short-circuited zero-token case rows prove zero-token planning.
Any energy estimate without a same-corpus baseline and a clear model/provider methodology.
claimGuidance.nextBenchmarkNeeded: Run the same 100 prompts through a chat-only baseline and Pack structured planning with full AI-call token accounting, then compare tokens, estimated model cost, retries, latency, and score.
